title: Guest can authenticate via OTP and reach the activity dashboard
description: Verifies a guest can request an OTP, submit a valid OTP, and land on the authenticated dashboard showing the activity log.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP code field
Verify the user lands on the activity dashboard with an activity list displayed

title: Logged-out user is redirected to login when trying to access auth-only routes
description: Verifies that visiting protected routes while logged out redirects the user to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Accept a book request and see it marked accepted
description: This test verifies a member can accept an incoming book request from the requests list and the UI reflects the accepted status.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Click the navigation link to open requests
Select an incoming request from the list
Verify the selected request shows an accepted status

title: User can open the activity log and navigate to a profile from an activity item
description: Verifies an authenticated user can view activities and open a user profile by selecting a user name from an activity.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP code field
Select a user's name from an activity item
Verify the profile page is displayed

title: Authenticated session persists across page refresh on the dashboard
description: Verifies that after successful OTP login, a browser refresh keeps the user authenticated and on the activity dashboard.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP code field
Press Control+R to refresh the page
Verify the user remains on the activity dashboard with an activity list displayed

title: Decline a book request and see it marked declined
description: This test verifies a member can decline an incoming book request from the requests list and the UI reflects the declined status.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Click the navigation link to open requests
Select an incoming request from the list
Verify the selected request shows a declined status

title: Profile page shows user details
description: Verifies an authenticated user can navigate to the profile page and see profile details rendered.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP code field
Click the navigation control to open the profile page

title: Send a chat message and see it appended
description: This test verifies a member can send a message in chat and the new message appears in the chat history.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Click the navigation link to open chat
Fill Chat message from automated test into the message input field
Verify the new message appears appended in the chat history

title: Requests list is visible on the requests page
description: This test verifies a signed-in member can open the requests page and see the requests list or an appropriate empty state.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Click the navigation link to open requests
Verify the requests list is displayed or an empty state is displayed

title: Sent chat message remains visible after leaving and returning
description: This test verifies a member’s sent message remains visible after navigating away from chat and returning to chat.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Click the navigation link to open chat
Fill Persisted chat message into the message input field
Click the navigation link to open requests
Click the navigation link to open chat
Verify the previously sent message is visible in the chat history

title: Chat history is visible on the chat page
description: This test verifies a signed-in member can open chat and see existing messages or an appropriate empty state.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Click the navigation link to open chat
Verify chat history is displayed or an empty state is displayed

title: Install prompt can be initiated in a PWA-capable browser
description: This test verifies a user can initiate installing the app when the browser supports PWA installation and the UI shows an install flow entry point.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Wait for the app shell to finish loading
Verify an option to install the app is available or the app indicates installation is already available through the browser

title: Guest sees validation when submitting an invalid OTP code
description: Verifies submitting an invalid OTP code shows an invalid credentials error and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Fill an invalid OTP code into the OTP code field
Verify an invalid OTP error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Accept action is not duplicated on rapid repeat interaction
description: This test verifies rapidly triggering accept for the same request does not create duplicate UI entries and results in a single accepted outcome.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Click the navigation link to open requests
Select an incoming request from the list
Verify the selected request shows an accepted status

title: Send action is not duplicated on rapid repeat interaction
description: This test verifies rapidly triggering send does not append duplicate messages for a single intended send action.

steps.description: Fill a valid OTP code into the OTP field
Click the navigation link to open chat
Fill Rapid send message into the message input field
Verify only one new instance of the message appears in the chat history
